0.Desc: A fresh and juicy apple. Restores a small amount of health.
0.Name: Apple

1.Desc: A well-aged cheese that hardens the body. Reduces damage taken for a short time.
1.Name: Cheese

10.Desc: A well-cooked fish that restores health when eaten.
10.Name: Cooked Fish

12.Desc: A magical scroll infused with ancient power. Grants +5 stat points.
12.Name: Enchanted Scroll

2.Desc: A powerful red potion brewed to restore a large amount of health.
2.Name: Health Potion

3.Desc: A rare leaf said to contain hidden power. Temporarily increases damage.
3.Name: Miracle Leaf

4.Desc: A delicate flower from the valley that sharpens a warrior’s instincts, increasing critical hit chance.
4.Name: Moon Blossom

5.Desc: A potion that energizes the body and increases movement speed.
5.Name: Speed Potion

6.Desc: A pill made from medicinal herbs that strengthens the body and increases maximum health.
6.Name: Herbal Pill

7.Desc: A mysterious forest mushroom that enhances the power of critical strikes.
7.Name: Mushroom

8.Desc: A freshly caught fish. Better cook before eating.
8.Name: Raw Fish

9.Desc: A fresh squid straight from the sea. Not very appetizing uncooked.
9.Name: Raw Squid
